title: CryptoCompare OHLCV Candle
description: Single OHLCV candle row returned by min-api /v2/histoday, /v2/histohour, /v2/histominute and the data-api /spot/v1/historical/* endpoints.

volumefrom.description: Base asset volume traded in the period.

volumeto.description: Quote asset volume traded in the period.

conversionType.description: How the price was derived (direct, multiply, invert_multiply, force_direct).

conversionSymbol.description: Intermediate symbol used when conversionType is not direct.
